<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a journal entry by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/journals/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the journal entry with all its lines.
